case_for: Cousins has cleared 12 points in three of his last six outings including two big weeks over 19 points, showing he has real ceiling upside when the passing game clicks.
case_against: His floor is genuinely low as shown by the 6.2 and 8.7 point performances, and the pregame projection of 11.1 sits just under the 12.0 threshold suggesting a slight favorite to fall short.
